name: Heroic Transformation
description:
Your nemesis seems to be defeating you, and he thinks it would be very clever to turn you into a girl and make you become his girlfriend. He is invulnerable in his exoskeleton, but when he comes out of it... What will you do, give in to pleasure or try to fight?

This scenario was made by me based on one now deleted scenario from AI Dungeon. The first message was taken from there, but I wrote the persona myself, relying on a not very large set from the original scenario and adding some cringe details based on my vision.

Please write your impression and tell me what to fix, if it’s not too much trouble.
creator: Agatumus
